stretches.title: Neck Turn
stretches.description:
Gently turn your head slowly to the left and right.
Hold for 15 seconds on each side.

stretches.title: Neck Tilt
stretches.description:
Gently tilt your ear toward your shoulder. Use your hand to apply light pressure.
Hold for 15 seconds on each side.

stretches.title: Chin Tuck
stretches.description:
Sit straight and gently pull your chin straight back (giving yourself a double chin).
Hold for 3 seconds, repeat 5 times.

stretches.title: Shoulder Shrugs
stretches.description:
Lift both shoulders up toward your ears. Hold for 3 seconds, then drop them completely.
Repeat 5 times.

stretches.title: Shoulder Rolls
stretches.description:
Roll your shoulders backward in a smooth circular motion.
Repeat 10 times to release tension.

stretches.title: Cross-Body Stretch
stretches.description:
Bring one arm across your chest and use your other hand to gently pull it closer.
Hold for 15 seconds on each side.

stretches.title: Forearm Flexor Stretch
stretches.description:
Extend your arm forward, palm facing up. Use your other hand to gently pull your fingers down.
Hold for 15 seconds per arm.

stretches.title: Forearm Extensor Stretch
stretches.description:
Extend your arm forward, palm facing down. Gently press the back of your hand down towards your body.
Hold for 15 seconds per arm.

stretches.title: Wrist Rotations
stretches.description:
Gently make a loose fist and rotate your wrists in circular motions, clockwise and counterclockwise.
10 times each direction.

stretches.title: Prayer Stretch
stretches.description:
Place your palms together in front of your chest. Gently press them together while lowering your hands until you feel a stretch.
Hold for 15 seconds.

stretches.title: Chest Opener
stretches.description:
Interlace your fingers behind your head, pull your elbows back, and gently push your chest forward.
Hold for 15 seconds.

stretches.title: The Bear Hug
stretches.description:
Hug yourself tightly by reaching your hands toward your opposite shoulder blades. Drop your chin to your chest.
Hold for 15 seconds.

stretches.title: Seated Spinal Twist
stretches.description:
Sit sideways on your chair. Gently twist your torso to look over your shoulder, holding the back of the chair.
Hold for 15 seconds per side.

stretches.title: Seated Forward Bend
stretches.description:
Sit with feet flat, slightly apart. Slowly bend forward, dropping your chest toward your knees and letting your arms hang.
Hold for 15 seconds.

stretches.title: Seated Figure Four
stretches.description:
Sit straight and place your right ankle over your left knee. Gently lean forward until you feel a stretch in your right hip.
Hold for 15 seconds per side.

stretches.title: Knee-to-Chest
stretches.description:
Sit tall, lift one knee toward your chest, and hug it with both hands.
Hold for 15 seconds per side.
